document_name: Hong Kong Film Production Cost & Talent Salary Data
description: Dataset of average production costs, crew salaries, equipment rentals, and talent fees for Hong Kong film productions, used to benchmark budgeting and production efficiency.
steps_to_find: Contact the Hong Kong Film Development Fund (HKFDF) for the latest production cost reports.
Access the HKFDF open data portal and download the relevant datasets.
Verify salary ranges from industry salary surveys and union publications.
Compile the data into a usable format for budgeting.
access_difficulty: Medium – requires registration with HKFDF and possible fee for detailed reports.

document_name: Hong Kong Film Censorship Ordinance & Case Law
description: Official text of the Hong Kong Film Censorship Ordinance and recent case law decisions, essential for assessing geopolitical risk and ensuring compliance.
recency_requirement: Latest amendment (2023) and cases within the last 5 years
steps_to_find: Navigate the Hong Kong e‑Legislation portal to download the current ordinance.
Search the Hong Kong Judiciary database for relevant censorship case law.
Compile a summary of key provisions and recent rulings.

document_name: Hong Kong Film Market & Distribution Data
description: Market data on box office performance, VOD and streaming uptake, audience demographics, and distribution channel performance in Hong Kong and broader Asian markets.
steps_to_find: Access the Hong Kong Box Office Association reports for box office figures.
Obtain distribution data from major streaming platforms (e.g., iQiyi, Netflix, Amazon Prime) via industry reports.
Collect audience demographic studies from market research firms.
Aggregate the data into a comprehensive market overview.
access_difficulty: Medium – some data behind paywalls or requires industry contacts.

document_name: Hong Kong Cultural Heritage & Landmark Database
description: GIS and descriptive database of Hong Kong landmarks, heritage sites, and cultural venues for authenticity and location scouting.
steps_to_find: Visit the Hong Kong Tourism Board’s open data portal.
Download the GIS layers and landmark listings.
Cross‑check with the Antiquities and Monuments Office for heritage status.
Compile a shortlist of relevant sites for the production.

document_name: Hong Kong Film Location Permitting Regulations & Data
description: Regulations governing film location permits, application forms, fee schedules, and historical permit data for Hong Kong.
recency_requirement: Current regulations (2024) and permit data for the last 2 years
steps_to_find: Contact the Hong Kong Film Development Council (HKFDC) to request the latest permitting guidelines.
Download application forms and fee schedules from the HKFDC website.
Request a summary of permit approvals and denials for the past 2 years.
Compile the information into a permitting reference guide.
access_difficulty: Medium – requires formal contact with HKFDC and possible fee.

description: Environmental regulations applicable to film production and recent weather pattern data to inform scheduling and risk mitigation.
recency_requirement: Latest regulations (2024) and weather data for the last 3 years
steps_to_find: Access the Hong Kong Environmental Protection Department’s regulations on waste, noise, and emissions.
Retrieve weather data from the Hong Kong Observatory for the past 3 years.
Summarize key environmental compliance requirements and typical weather windows.
Integrate findings into the production risk register.
access_difficulty: Medium – public data but may require registration for detailed datasets.
